title: Scale simulation — 10K+ accounts × N devices, distribution modeling
design: GenerateFleet(numAccounts, autoRatio, rng) creates full fleet with FleetStats. GenerateAccountDevices sets AccountID. Deterministic via PCG seed.
acceptance_criteria: 10K accounts (106K devices, 0.2s), 100K accounts (1.06M devices, 1.5s), deterministic reproduction verified, safety audit stats
notes: 1.06M devices generated in 1.5s with zero real hardware. 202K safety-critical devices identified.

title: Doltgres audit activity — row-level migration log
Realistic failure simulation — rate limit, latency, partial outage, network partition
Temporal Query handler for real-time progress
Safety class — critical devices (camera/lock) get extra verification and stricter rollback
design: SafetyClass enum (critical/important/normal), CategorySafetyClass() mapping, Device.IsCritical() helper. Critical: camera/lock/smoke/CO/alarm/doorbell. Important: thermostat/garage/valve.
acceptance_criteria: All 15 categories mapped, Device.IsCritical() tested, fleet stats track safety breakdown
notes: ~19% critical, ~5% important, ~76% normal in weighted category distribution

title: NixOS flake.nix dev environment
design: flake.nix with nixos-25.11 pinned: Go, temporal-cli (includes dev server), psql, gopls, golangci-lint, delve
acceptance_criteria: nix develop provides complete environment, temporal server start-dev works
notes: temporal-cli 1.5.1 bundles Server 1.29.1 + UI 2.42.1. No Docker needed for dev.

title: Test coverage: 48 tests, 98.6% library coverage
design: Mock adapter with 6 error injection points, random device/automation generator with deterministic seeds, Temporal testsuite for workflow+activity tests
acceptance_criteria: 48 tests pass, 98.6% library coverage (mock 98.1%, activities 97.8%, models 100%, workflows 100%)
notes: math/rand/v2 required for IntN/NewPCG. SuccessThreshold <= 0 gets overridden to default.

title: Account model — devices belong to accounts, migration is per-account
design: Account model: ID/Email/Region/Tier/DevCount. AccountBatchConfig for cohort-level orchestration. AccountBatchResult with per-account tracking + critical failure count.
acceptance_criteria: Account model created, AccountSuccessRate/HasCriticalFailures tested, GenerateAccounts with realistic tier/region distribution
notes: Power-law device distribution: 60% have 1-5, 25% have 5-15, 10% have 15-40, 5% have 40-100 devices

title: Core framework: models, interfaces, workflows, mock adapter
design: Platform-agnostic core: Device/Automation models, SourcePlatform/TargetPlatform interfaces, DeviceMigrationWorkflow with 2-phase (devices then automations), Saga compensation on every step
acceptance_criteria: go build passes, workflow executes on Temporal dev server, 5/5 mock devices migrated
notes: Go 1.25, Temporal SDK latest, sequential migration (fan-out later)
